title: EarnDeliveryModalityTypeValues
description: Voucher / Coupon Delivery: Rewards issued as redeemable vouchers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Credit Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards paid directly to a bank account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Balance Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Points added to a loyalty or rewards wallet

x-enumeration-literals.name: Statement Credit Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards applied as a credit on the statement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Service / Product Delivery: Rewards credited to pay for services or merchandise.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Hybrid Delivery
x-enumeration-literals.description: Rewards delivered in multiple forms simultaneously.
